tools.name: ctrl_get_vault_status
tools.description: Read the user's CTRL vault address, ETH + WETH balance, and active rules. Call this BEFORE ctrl_activate so you can tell the user how much they need to fund.

tools.name: ctrl_get_block_catalog
tools.description: Return the live catalog of every CTRL workflow block with id, label, description, and config-field schemas. Call this before ctrl_create_workflow when unsure of a block's config shape. Pass `chain` to filter to blocks that are compatible with the target chain (Base = launchpads + Aerodrome + UniV4;

tools.name: ctrl_create_workflow
tools.description: Create a CTRL workflow draft. ONE trigger + an ordered chain of up to 20 actions/conditions/utilities. Returns { workflowId, activateUrl }. Pass `targetChain` to pick which chain the workflow runs on — "base" (default, launchpads + Aerodrome + UniV4) or "ethereum" (UniV3 only, no launchpads, no clan

tools.name: ctrl_activate
tools.description: Return an EIP-5792 transactions[] batch the user signs ONCE to deploy their vault + register spending rules. After signing, the keeper runs the workflow autonomously per the on-chain caps.

tools.name: ctrl_withdraw
tools.description: Return an EIP-5792 batch the user signs to withdraw funds from their CTRL vault back to their wallet. The agent never signs. token defaults to ETH; pass WETH or a 0x token address for other assets; omit amount to withdraw the full balance.

tools.name: ctrl_fire_manual
tools.description: Manually fire a workflow once. Keeper picks up within ~5s. Use to test a workflow without waiting for its natural trigger.

tools.name: ctrl_get_execution_logs
tools.description: Read recent workflow executions: trigger, status, BaseScan tx hash, gas, timing. Without workflowId returns the user's most recent across all workflows.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "ctrl_create_workflow" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Create a CTRL workflow draft. ONE trigger + an ordered chain of up to 20 actions/conditions/utilities. Returns { workflowId, activateUrl }. Pass `targetChain` t…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "ctrl_create_workflow" is 1319 chars, far longer than this server's median (188). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
